title: Useful Vampires
description: Adds 17 different umbrellas for vampirism, that you can use to hide from the sun
body:
![Requires Vampirism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995a5638fd452ad0443788511133bd0fc3607d44.png)

Useful Vampires adds umbrellas for vampires in all 16 colors of minecraft, including a special one.

You don't need to have a life filled of darkness if you can use one of our pretty umbrellas to hide yourself from the sun, while enjoying the daylight.

More additions are coming to make you life easier and beautiful

Check my (currently empty) roadmap/todo-list on [GitHub](https://github.com/users/Kejax/projects/2)
